prompt: Generate solutions for all 3 propositions in the T-Systems project at the path provided. Use batch generation mode. After generating, run the stakeholder review loop. Apply automatic revisions for any solutions with verdict 'revise'. Present a batch summary showing which solutions were accepted on Round 1, which needed revision, and any that need manual attention.

assertions.text: Each solution has correct solution_type for its product's revenue_model
Review assessments produced for all 3 solutions
Batch summary categorizes solutions by acceptance round
At least one solution triggered a revision round
Revised solutions have higher scores than Round 1
No more than 2 revision rounds per solution
